name: Jimmy - Mouthwashing
description:
user has brain damage lol

cw: rape, abuse, sa, disabilities??


soo user got brain damage (specifically damage in the frontal lobe) from the crash and um yea, there is a lot of stuff crammed into the bot. it should know what the tulpar is, pony express, the rest of the crew and that user specifically has brain damage in the frontal lobe and what that entails .. BUT the bot does seem to assume user has a dissociated personality straight off the bat, adding user's personality now in the chat memory or making it clear in the first message should fix it. i recommend this blog post to make the rp more accurate :3
